title: UI: Style Profiles page (list presets/customs + create custom)

task.description: Build a responsive page to list system preset and custom style profiles from GET /api/style-profiles, and a create form that submits POST /api/style-profiles with 3–5 sample texts. Show empty, loading, and error states.
acceptance_criteria: On load, the page fetches GET /api/style-profiles and renders two sections: Presets and Your styles; presets render exactly 2 cards on a fresh DB.
Submitting the create form with 3 sample texts creates a new custom card that appears after refresh (re-fetch).
Submitting with 2 or 6 sample texts shows the API validation message from error.fields.sampleTexts on the page.
If the GET request fails (non-2xx), an error banner with a Retry button is shown and Retry re-attempts the fetch.
Grid is responsive: 1 column on mobile, 2 on sm, 3 on lg, with card hover shadow.

definition_of_done: Uses Tailwind color vars only and lucide-react icons if available in repo.
All interactions work without leaving the page (client-side fetch).
ui_requirements: Sections: header + create card (Textarea list inputs) + grids for presets/customs. States: skeleton, empty state (icon+CTA), error banner+retry. Buttons min-h-[44px], inputs w-full.
